## WhatsApp Message to Workshop
<!-- Copy-paste this directly into WhatsApp -->

```
Assalamu alaikum,

New order:
- Product: [NAME — do not describe what you're selling or where]
- Material: [MATERIAL + SPEC]
- Batch: 30 units
- Deadline: [DATE]
- Assembly: [DESCRIBE STEPS]
- Path: [Standard / Base-only for Semi-DIY]
- Target price: ≤[X] EGP per unit

Please confirm:
□ Can you produce this?
□ Your price at 30 units
□ Timeline (days)
□ You will send WhatsApp photo of first 3 units before full batch

Thank you
```

---

## Payment Terms

- 50% deposit to start (funded by shop pre-sell deposits)
- 50% on collection after QC approval
- Personal capital advanced: **zero**
